title: Settings
description: Manage your profile and account settings

profilePage.title: Profile settings
profilePage.heading: Profile information
profilePage.name: Name
profilePage.resendVerification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profilePage.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

securityPage.title: Security settings
securityPage.updatePasswordDescription: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
securityPage.twoFactorEnableHint: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
securityPage.twoFactorEnabledHint: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.

twoFactorSetup.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
twoFactorSetup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish setup.
twoFactorSetup.enableDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then continue.

twoFactorRecovery.title: 2FA recovery codes
twoFactorRecovery.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
twoFactorRecovery.footerPrefix: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click

twoFactorErrors.fetchSetupKey: Failed to fetch a setup key.

billingPage.title: Plan & billing
billingPage.heading: Plan & billing
billingPage.description: Compare plans, review quotas, and pick the option that matches your workload.

hero.title: Ready-made plans for different levels of usage
hero.text: The page already shows the current plan, main quotas, and upgrade paths. Payment is not connected yet, so pay buttons lead to a reusable placeholder screen.

billingPage.compareDescription: Compare the key daily limits side by side without reading long conditions.

compare.seoAudit: SEO audit / Site Intel per day

billingPage.supportTitle: Need broader access than your current plan?
billingPage.supportText: Choose the plan that fits you best and continue. Payment is temporarily unavailable, but it will be available soon.

reason.planTitle: This feature is locked by plan
reason.planText: Your current plan does not include this capability. Choose Plus or Pro to unlock broader access.
reason.planTextWithFeature: Your current plan does not include this capability: :feature. Choose Plus or Pro to unlock broader access.
reason.quotaText: You have reached the limit of your current plan. A higher plan gives you more daily quota.
reason.quotaTextWithFeature: You have reached the quota for: :feature. A higher plan gives you more daily quota.

free.name: Free
free.description: Best for exploring the interface and basic platform navigation.

highlights.second: No practical quota for paid OSINT workflows.
highlights.third: A safe entry point for team familiarization.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: Designed for individual recurring work with moderate daily load.

highlights.first: Daily quotas for analytics and parser actions.
highlights.second: A good fit for analysts running several cases in parallel.
highlights.third: Balanced plan for day-to-day OSINT work.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For intensive usage, higher request volume, and steady investigative workloads.

highlights.first: Maximum daily quotas for deeper operational work.
highlights.second: A strong choice for teams that need quota headroom.
highlights.third: Best suited for continuous analytical usage.

placeholderPage.title: Temporarily unavailable
placeholderPage.heading: Coming soon
placeholderPage.description: This section is temporarily unavailable. We are preparing it for launch.

generic.title: This section will be available soon
generic.description: This feature is temporarily unavailable, but we are already working on it.

bullets.first: For now, you can go back and continue using the service.
bullets.second: As soon as the section is ready, it will appear here automatically.

generic.note: This section will appear in one of the upcoming updates.

checkout.title: Payment for the “:plan” plan is coming soon
checkout.description: Online payment is temporarily unavailable, but we are already preparing it.

bullets.first: Your selected plan is saved, and you will be able to complete it a little later.
bullets.second: For now, you can go back and compare the available plans.
bullets.third: We will add payment in one of the next updates.

checkout.note: Thank you for your interest. Payment will be available very soon.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
